prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `00dbd492`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `00dbd492` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00dbd492/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00dbd492/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00dbd492/generator.py#L35), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00dbd492/notes.md). The rule is: detect each hollow red square frame, preserve the red border and red center cell, and fill the remaining interior by size: `5x5 -> 8`, `7x7 -> 4`, `9x9 -> 3`.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting hypothesis and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint; it misread the official square frames as rectangles, and that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_00dbd492/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation is complete: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 00dbd492` passed all 5 official examples, the builder produced 1000 verified examples in [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/task.json) plus [examples/](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/examples), and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/previews/preview_01.png). The generator matches the task family because it only samples non-overlapping `5/7/9` red square frames with preserved center dots on square zero-background grids, then derives outputs with the same size-based fill rule. Originals and previews are at [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/00dbd492/previews/preview_03.png).
